title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates!
